# Cockpit AI

> AI-first Development Environment Orchestrator
> Write Once, Apply Anywhere — one config synced to Claude Code, Cursor, OpenCode, AGENTS.md, and more.

## Quick Start

```bash
npm install -g @cockpit-ai/cli
cockpit setup          # one-touch: init + auto-detect stack + apply to all AI tools
```

## Core Concepts

**Workspace** — a directory containing `.cockpit/config.yaml`. Represents a project or monorepo root.

**Context rules** — plain-text instructions injected into AI tool config files (CLAUDE.md, .cursor/rules/, AGENTS.md etc.). Defined inline in config.yaml or as `.md` files in `.cockpit/context/`.

**Scope** — determined by *directory location*, not frontmatter:
- `.cockpit/context/*.md` → **global** (applies to all projects)
- `.cockpit/projects/<name>/context/*.md` → **project** (applies to one project)

**Skills** — reusable prompt fragments that become Claude Code slash commands, Cursor rules, etc.

**Adapters** — translators: `claude-code`, `cursor`, `opencode`, `agents-md`.

**Agents** — autonomous processes launched via `cockpit agent spawn`. Each agent runs Claude Code CLI as a subprocess with a task description.

## File Structure

```
~/.cockpit/profile.yaml                              Personal global preferences & sync config
.cockpit/config.yaml                                 Workspace config
.cockpit/projects/<name>.yaml                        Per-project config
.cockpit/context/conventions.md                      Global rules (auto-loaded)
.cockpit/context/testing/vitest.md                   Global rules in subdirectory
.cockpit/projects/<name>/context/arch.md             Project-scoped rules (auto-loaded)
.cockpit/projects/<name>/skills/<skill>.yaml         Project-scoped skills
.cockpit/skills/<name>.yaml                          Workspace-wide skill definitions
.cockpit/agents/<name>.yaml                          Agent definitions
```

## config.yaml Reference

```yaml
cockpit: "1.0"

workspace:
  name: my-workspace
  default_adapter: claude-code

adapters:
  - claude-code      # writes CLAUDE.md + .claude/skills/
  - cursor           # writes .cursor/rules/
  - opencode         # writes .opencode/instructions.md
  - agents-md        # writes AGENTS.md

context:
  global:
    - "Use TypeScript strict mode"
    - "Prefer functional patterns"
  files:
    - ".cockpit/context/**/*.md"

skills:
  include: []        # paths to custom skill dirs
```

## Agent Definition Example

```yaml
name: code-reviewer
role: Reviews code for bugs, performance, and style
model: claude-sonnet-4-6
skills: [code-review]
context_includes:
  - conventions
worktree:
  auto_create: true
  branch_prefix: "review/"
```

## Essential CLI Commands

```
cockpit setup                        One-touch init + analyze + apply
cockpit init [path]                  Initialize a workspace
cockpit status                       Show merged config and environment
cockpit apply                        Sync config to all AI tools
cockpit apply --dry-run              Preview without writing files
cockpit apply --clean                Remove cockpit-managed sections

cockpit project init <name>          Register a project in the workspace
cockpit project list                 List all configured projects
cockpit project remove <name>        Remove a project

cockpit context show                 List all active rules
cockpit context add "<rule>"         Add a rule (--project for project scope)
cockpit context remove "<rule>"      Remove a rule
cockpit context generate             Write rules to CLAUDE.md etc.
cockpit context analyze [--apply]    Auto-detect tech stack and suggest rules
cockpit context lint                 Find stale or conflicting rules
cockpit context stats                Token cost per rule

cockpit agent spawn <name> "<task>"  Spawn an agent subprocess
cockpit agent stop <runId>           Kill a running agent
cockpit agent status                 Dashboard of all runs
cockpit agent logs <runId>           Show output for a run

cockpit worktree create <branch>     Create a git worktree
cockpit worktree clean               Prune stale worktrees

cockpit profile create               Set up personal profile
cockpit profile sync push/pull       Git-sync profile across machines
```

## Context File Format

Context files are plain markdown. Frontmatter is stripped; scope is location-based.

```markdown
# Testing Conventions

Use Vitest for all tests. Import from `vitest`, not `@jest/*`.
Prefer `vi.fn()` over `jest.fn()`. Use `vi.mock()` for module mocking.
```

## Skill Definition Format

```yaml
name: code-review
version: 1.0.0
description: Review code for bugs, performance, and security
trigger:
  - "/review"
prompt: |
  Review the provided code for:
  - Logic errors and edge cases
  - Performance bottlenecks
  - Security vulnerabilities
adapters:
  claude-code:
    type: skill      # → .claude/skills/code-review/SKILL.md
  cursor:
    type: rule       # → .cursor/rules/code-review.mdc
```

## Built-in Skills (always applied)

- `/cockpit-context-update` — Analyze project and update `.cockpit/context/` files
- `/cockpit-setup` — Set up Cockpit in any project interactively

## Architecture (for contributors)

Monorepo with pnpm + Turborepo. Packages:

| Package | Role |
|---------|------|
| `@cockpit-ai/core` | Types, config schema (Zod), config discovery/resolution |
| `@cockpit-ai/cli` | Commander.js CLI, all user-facing commands |
| `@cockpit-ai/adapters` | Claude Code, Cursor, OpenCode, AGENTS.md adapter implementations |
| `@cockpit-ai/context` | ContextManager, file discovery, tech stack analyzer, rule generator |
| `@cockpit-ai/skills` | Skill loader, YAML → ResolvedSkill, SkillRegistry |
| `@cockpit-ai/agents` | AgentSpawner, ClaudeRunner, WorktreeIntegration, state management |
| `@cockpit-ai/worktree` | WorktreeManager (git worktree CRUD) |

Build: `pnpm build` | Test: `pnpm test` | Dev: `pnpm dev`
